title: Ep 59: OpenAI Product & Eng Leads Nikunj Handa and Steve Coffey on OpenAI’s New Agent Development Tools
full_text: Two weeks ago, OpenAI released its set of tools to help developers build agentic systems. Today on Unsupervised Learning, Nikunj Handa (Product Lead) and Steve Coffey (Eng Lead) answer some of the biggest questions around how developers should be thinking about building in the agentic paradigm in 2025. (0:00) Intro(0:53) OpenAI’s Vision for Consumer Interaction(4:51) Building Multi-Agent Systems for Business Solutions(6:53) Challenges and Innovations in AI Fine-Tuning(13:20) Exploring Computer U

## clean_text
